name: Blackbirdie Indoor Golf Sport Bar & Grill
about: Blackbirdie Indoor Golf Sport Bar & Grill is a premier indoor golf simulator venue located in Dyer, Indiana. The facility offers four bays powered by Trackman technology, providing a realistic golfing experience for all skill levels. It combines golf simulation with a full bar and a food menu, making it suitable for casual rounds, practice sessions, and social gatherings. The venue is available for private events, parties, and corporate outings, with group accommodations and additional amenities like pool and darts. Lessons are also offered using TrackMan technology and video analysis for players of all abilities.
why_golfers_like_it: Cutting-edge Trackman-powered simulators for realistic play
Full bar and food menu for a complete golf and social experience
Family-friendly atmosphere with diverse group accommodations
Professional instruction using advanced technology and video analysis

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with pizza, wings, and other food items available
Full bar with ice cold beer and craft cocktails

simulator_hardware.notes: All 4 bays are powered by the top-rated golf simulator system

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but Blackbirdie also offers club rentals for $15 for the duration of your simulator rental.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and a kitchen that serves food, so outside food and drink are likely not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: This information is not explicitly stated on the website.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Blackbirdie Golf is described as a family-friendly space that welcomes golf enthusiasts of all ages.
